Case Studies

Lumen
Live Prototype
Walmart collects rich behavioral signals across 270 million weekly customers, but the system that turns those signals into individual action does not exist in a consistent, systematic form. This case study defines what that decisioning layer would look like, how it would ship inside Walmart, and what success would require. Includes a working prototype of the core decisioning logic.
AI DecisioningLifecycle GrowthExperimentation
Read case study → Try the prototype ↗
Dropbox Team Foundations
Live Prototype
The structural gaps blocking Dropbox Teams growth are the same problems I spent years solving at SAP Business Network: onboarding flows that create uncertainty instead of removing it, identity models that force users to choose rather than accumulate access, and licensing that does not match how modern teams work. This brief identifies five gaps, proposes the fixes, and includes an interactive prototype of two key flows.
B2B PlatformEnterprise GrowthOnboarding
Read case study →
CampSpark
Live Prototype
A working prototype built end-to-end without engineering support, covering user research, product scoping, and a deployed interactive tool. CampSpark addresses summer camp discovery and planning for working parents, replacing a process that typically spans dozens of websites, spreadsheets, and group texts. Validated with real users.
Zero-to-OneSolo BuildConsumer
Read case study → Try the prototype ↗

Experience

Principal Product Manager
2025 — Present
Walmart Global Tech · Sunnyvale, CA
Own product strategy and GMV growth for Walmart Fulfillment Services, a $500M+ business enabling third-party sellers to compete on Walmart Marketplace through faster delivery across Canada, Mexico, and Chile.
Marketplace Fulfillment International
Principal Product Manager
2023 — 2024
Cornerstone OnDemand · Dublin, CA
Led API product strategy, roadmap, and monetization across Cornerstone's entire product portfolio. Redesigned the monetization model while grandfathering existing enterprise customers. Elevated a fragmented developer experience into a reliable API platform driving 40% growth in API adoption.
API Strategy Enterprise SaaS
Director, Product Management (IC)
2021 — 2023
Dell Technologies · Remote
Identified SMBs as an underserved market and led the zero-to-one launch of Dell APEX PC as a Service, Dell's first device subscription business, shipping beta in 6 weeks with 20 pilot customers and creating a new recurring revenue stream where none previously existed.
Zero to One Subscription
Director, Product Management (IC)
2018 — 2021
SAP · Palo Alto, CA
Drove the strategic transformation of supplier onboarding on SAP Business Network, the world's largest B2B procurement network processing $6T in annual transactions. Reimagined the supplier experience through complete UX overhaul, microservices migration, first-ever product instrumentation, and behavioral A/B testing, reducing supplier drop-off by 73%.
B2B Commerce 73% Drop-off Reduction $6T Network

About

By day I run three international markets. By night I tell AI to build things and argue about why they don't look right. When I'm not doing either, I'm walking my dog, listening to the same podcast episode twice, or adding another destination to a travel list I'll get to someday.
